text:
On Fri, Aug 11, 2000 at 12:08:57PM +0200, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
> This will probably be fine once you have:
> 
> Expanded the contraction "isn't" -> "is not".
> Applied the commonly accepted line breaking guidelines.
> Decapitalized "UP".
> Removed the word "So" from the beginning of a sentence.
> Marked "sleep 5" up with the Ql macro.

Bill?  You wanna commit this with these minor fixes as sheldon suggests?
Or shall I do it for you?  :-)

-- 
Will Andrews <andrewsw@purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
